---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Beauty Style Pro
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

> Example: "As a [type of user], I want to [goal] so that [benefit]."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include mockups, diagrams, or pseudo-code if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or features? Why did you choose this one?

## Use Cases

List specific use cases for this feature:

- Use case 1
- Use case 2

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocks core workflow)
- [ ] High (significantly improves experience)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)

## Affected Areas

- [ ] Frontend (React / UI)
- [ ] Backend (Supabase / Edge Functions)
- [ ] Mobile (iOS / Android)
- [ ] AI Features (Stella / AI Preview)
- [ ] Payments (Stripe / PayPal)
- [ ] Academy (LMS)
- [ ] Shop Marketplace
- [ ] Other: \***\*\_\_\_\*\***

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or links here.
